requirement_topic.en: EMC and Wireless Compliance — CRC and ANE Interfaces
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 与无线合规——CRC 与 ANE 的接口要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 與無線合規——CRC 與 ANE 的接口要求

summary.en: For lithium battery and power bank products with radio or wireless functions, Colombian market entry generally requires confirmation through the telecom and radio approval process, coordinated with the same safety documentation chain used for the power system review. CRC/ANE-style telecom governance and local EMC expectations are destination-facing and should be addressed before import.
summary.zh: 对于带有无线功能的锂电池或移动电源，哥伦比亚市场进入通常要求通过无线通信与电磁兼容审查链条确认，常与电气安全技术链路联动。CRC/ANE 类监管与当地 EMC 要求属于目的地管理内容，应在进口前完成确认。
summary.zht: 對於具備無線功能之鋰電池或行動電源，哥倫比亞市場進入通常要求通過無線通信與電磁相容審查鏈條確認，常與電氣安全技術鏈路聯動。CRC/ANE 類監管與當地 EMC 要求屬於目的地管理內容，應於進口前完成確認。

standards_or_laws: CRC / ANE destination telecom governance for radio devices
Destination-specific EMC compatibility expectations for products with wireless functions
Colombian telecom filing and approval process where CRC/ANE scope is triggered

summary.en: China uses GB/T EMC and communication-related product test norms in export dossiers, and these can support technical evidence. They are, however, a different governance system and do not automatically satisfy Colombian CRC/ANE destination handling.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件常使用 GB/T 的 EMC 与通信测试规则，可用于技术支撑，但该体系与哥伦比亚 CRC/ANE 目的地处理机制并不自动等价。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件常使用 GB/T 的 EMC 與通信測試規則，可作為技術支撐，但該體系與哥倫比亞 CRC/ANE 目的地處理機制並不自動等價。

standards_or_laws: GB / GB T EMC and communication test practices used in Chinese export records

gap.en: The gap is route-specific approval sequencing: a China wireless dossier is not sufficient unless mapped to CRC/ANE scope, declaration fields, and approved model use in Colombia. Wireless clearance is tied to destination entry steps, not Chinese domestic test scope alone.
gap.zh: 差距在于审批序列和范围映射：中国的无线文件仅是基础材料，只有在映射至哥伦比亚 CRC/ANE 适用范围、申报字段和型号范围后才有效，不能仅凭国内测试范围跨境自动放行。
gap.zht: 差距在於審批順序與範圍映射：中國之無線文件僅為基礎材料，只有映射至哥倫比亞 CRC/ANE 適用範圍、申報欄位及型號範圍後才有效，不能僅憑國內測試範圍跨境自動放行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a product contains wireless transmit/receive functions and Colombia telecom entry scope is triggered.
mandatory_status.cn: China GB / GB T communication and EMC evidence is mandatory in Chinese domestic workflows for many categories, but not an automatic substitute for Colombia CRC/ANE destination clearance.

source.publisher: Autoridad Nacional de Televisión and telecom-related governance references in Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Route wireless-capable lithium products through destination approval early; Colombia is judged on CRC/ANE destination handling and not solely on China GB/T evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无线功能产品需尽早进入目的地批准流程；哥伦比亚主要按 CRC/ANE 的目的地处理判断，而非仅以中国 GB/T 证据为准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無線功能產品需盡早進入目的地批准流程；哥倫比亞主要按 CRC/ANE 的目的地處理判斷，而非僅以中國 GB/T 證據為準。
